description_long: This is a single athletic running shoe featuring a mesh upper in dark blue with green and orange synthetic overlays for structural support. The shoe has a prominent Asics-style side stripe in orange and green, with additional green accents around the heel and collar. The laces are dark and threaded through reinforced eyelets, while the tongue is padded for comfort. The midsole is thick and white with visible cushioning, and the outsole has a rugged tread for traction. The interior appears padded, and the overall design suggests breathability and support for active use.
description: A dark blue athletic running shoe with green and orange accents, mesh upper, and a thick cushioned sole. Features a distinctive side stripe and rugged tread for traction.
description_view_0: Front and side view showing the mesh toe box, lacing, and prominent side stripe.
description_view_1: Rear and side view highlighting the green heel support and padded collar.
description_view_2: Back angle showing the heel structure, green overlays, and part of the sole.
description_view_3: Front angle emphasizing the toe, lacing system, and side overlays.
attribute_logo: Orange and green Asics side stripe logo on both sides of the shoe.
